name: raph
description: Codex plugin for shared Raph memory, docs, and codebase indexing.

interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to Raph so shared memory, URL-based documentation, and codebase indexing are always available when the plugin is used.
defaultPrompt: Use Raph as shared memory before answering.
Crawl docs from URLs and retain useful facts.
Index the current codebase whenever context may help.
